title: ロードナイトと夢の石

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The group find Oberon's Palace and enter the blue cave bathed in
moonlight.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Gasp! This is it, Oberon's Palace! The final destination of the story!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Amazing! The walls are actually glowing blue!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's out of this world! To think a place like this really exists...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh? There are footprints...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, over there! It's hard to see in the dark, but there on top of that
pedestal...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's it! The Dreamstone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So this is the Dreamstone... It looks beautiful in the moonlight.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Rob Roy, thank you! Everything feels so very special right
now!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: No, thank you! I'm very grateful to all of you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The Dreamstone is said to be modeled on a crystal called rhodonite,
which is also the name of the protagonist.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's a crystal known to represent friendship, and in the story it can only
be found when all kinds of villagers come together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All kinds of people working together...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That's right. Do you remember? In Rhodonite and the Dreamstone...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The clever villager deciphers the map, the brave one clears the path,
the strong one defeats the monster, the kind one offers emotional
support, and the levelheaded one unites everyone.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If even one person was missing, they never would've made it to the
Dreamstone.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
For us to arrive at this point, we faced challenges that would be
physically impossible to get past on our own.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The person who made this place must have wanted people to come
together and combine their strengths too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, true! Just today, Taiki gathered information, Rob Roy decoded
the writing—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And if Dober hadn't stopped us, we all would've given up and gone
back to the tree house!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's so true! You know, I think we all played our part in the best
way we could!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(To be honest, in the beginning, I thought we would do nothing more
than imitate the story. And I would've been satisfied with that. But...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(I'm grateful for all the beautiful sights we saw, the traps we overcame
together, and most of all...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (I'm... glad that I like books. I am!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Woo! The last night of the trip is party night!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, are you sure about earlier? After all that searching, we put
the Dreamstone back where we found it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...I saw footprints inside the cave. It made me realize, there must've
been other people who knew the story too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So... I'd like to preserve the dream for the next "villagers" who come
along after us. Because stories transcend time and place to stir dreams
within us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Stir up dreams, you say? ...Oh, hey! I wanna know more about
your favorite books sometime!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I never knew much about books, but that adrenaline-filled
adventure we just had was super exciting!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: G-gladly!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Say cheese! Oh, I'm out of battery! Haha! Oh well, I've already taken
plenty of great pics!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I made so many wonderful memories with a beautiful backdrop! I'm so
happy I came on this Summer Walk!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I see, so you enjoyed yourself, did you? Then, mission accomplished, I
guess!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What mission? Oh! By any chance, when ya brought that pamphlet
back to the room, was it for me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What?! Uh, I mean... You haven't been back home in a while, have
you? So I thought... it might help take your mind off things a little...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aw, is that why? I've gotta get better at being alone, I guess!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Really? Why?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, Rob Roy said it just now. Your photos gave her a lot of joy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The photos you take are full of smiles. Since you like people, that
sentiment shows through naturally.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason we made it to the Dreamstone was thanks to your
affable personality, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So basically, you feeling lonely quickly is just proof that you love
people. And I think that's a great quality about you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Getting lonely is proof that I love people? Haha!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Then in that case, I'm fine just the way I am, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's come here together again someday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you beat me to the invite once again. But, yes. It's a promise.
